2605.30040.title: Token Inflation: How Dishonest Providers Can Overcharge for Large Language Model Usage
2605.30040.paper_summary: Per-token billing is now the standard pricing model for commercial large language models (LLMs), so the honesty of reported token counts directly affects what users pay. We show that this kind of billing is hard to audit by design: providers hide the model, the tokenizer, and the execution to protect their IP, mitigate jailbreaks, and preserve user privacy, which means an auditor can only inspect proofs the provider supplies. The audit therefore reduces to a consistency check on the provider's own reports. We call this a trust paradox: every audit must trust some artifact, but current frameworks trust exactly the ones a provider has the strongest reason to manipulate. We study three recent token auditing frameworks and show that a provider with ordinary commercial capabilities can systematically inflate billed token counts. In the most permissive setting, hidden reasoning usage can be inflated by 1,469% on average without detection. At current frontier reasoning prices, that turns a \$100 honest bill into roughly a \$1,569 bill on the same query. Even when the user can see the full reasoning string, tokenization ambiguity alone still allows 50.85% over-reporting below the detection threshold. These results suggest the problem is not in any specific auditor but in any audit whose evidence comes from the audited party. Restoring honest billing will require verification that ties reported token counts to evidence the provider does not control, such as trusted execution attestation, cryptographic proofs of inference, or third-party re-execution.
2605.30040.paper_summary_zh: 每個標記計費現在是商業大型語言模型（LLMs）的標準定價模型，因此報告的標記數量的誠實性直接影響用戶支付的費用。<lb/>我們顯示這種計費在設計上難以審計：提供者隱藏模型、標記器和執行以保護其知識產權、減輕越獄風險並保護用戶隱私，這意味著審計員只能檢查提供者提供的證據。<lb/>因此，審計簡化為對提供者自身報告的一致性檢查。<lb/>我們稱這為信任悖論：每次審計必須信任某些工件，但當前框架恰好信任提供者有最強操控理由的那些工件。<lb/>我們研究了三個最近的標記審計框架，並顯示具有普通商業能力的提供者可以系統性地膨脹計費的標記數量。<lb/>在最寬鬆的環境中，隱藏的推理使用量平均可以膨脹1,469%而不被檢測到。<lb/>以當前前沿推理價格計算，這將一個100美元的誠實帳單變成大約1,569美元的帳單，針對相同的查詢。<lb/>即使用戶可以看到完整的推理字符串，僅僅是標記化的模糊性仍然允許在檢測閾值下超報50.85%。<lb/>這些結果表明問題不在於任何特定的審計員，而在於任何其證據來自被審計方的審計。<lb/>恢復誠實計費將需要驗證，將報告的標記數量與提供者無法控制的證據聯繫起來，例如可信執行證明、推理的加密證明或第三方重新執行。
2605.30040.author: Shahinul Hoque et.al.
2605.30040.authors: Shahinul Hoque, Jinghuai Zhang, Jinyuan Sun, Fnu Suya
